name: Honeydew Melon with Rice Wine Vinegar and Cilantro (Cool)
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed the melon, peel and cut into fork-sized chunks.
2. Seed the chile pepper (Anaheim or Jalapeno) and cut into thin strips.
3. Place the melon chunks in a bowl. Sprinkle with vinegar, pepper strips, and cilantro.
4. Place in the refrigerator to chill for 20 minutes.
5. Drain off any juices that have collected.
6. Serve the chilled melon for breakfast or brunch.
